title: cyclopteris fragilis
intro: Cyclopteris fragilis is a rare and ancient plant species that was previously found in the fossil record, known to have existed during the Carboniferous period, and was considered a part of the extinct genus of ferns. Although it is no longer found in its original form, the fossil record of this plant is significant in understanding the evolution of plant life. There is limited information available about the medicinal properties of Cyclopteris fragilis, but it is believed to have had potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. If it were available in its original form, it could have been used in herbal preparations such as teas or infusions, but its modern applications are purely speculative.
